policy_description: Before formal strict COVID admission policy period.
testing_policy: No formal strict admission RT-PCR requirement in this policy calendar period.
induction_admission_relevance: No COVID admission-PCR-driven scheduled 37-38 week induction policy defined for this period.
source_document: Formal hospital COVID policy timeline confirmed by clinical team.
notes: Start date is dataset earliest DELIVERY_TIME; no records are expected because start_date is later than end_date in the available dataset window.

policy_description: New asymptomatic admissions and companions required negative RT-PCR within 48 hours before admission or on admission day; companion restrictions; confirmed COVID obstetric patients admitted to negative-pressure or dedicated wards; from 2021-05, scheduled 37-38 week admission induction began in response to admission PCR; in 2022-07, delivery-room isolation labor room was established.
admission_policy: New asymptomatic admissions required negative RT-PCR within 48 hours before admission or on admission day.
testing_policy: Negative RT-PCR required for new asymptomatic admitted patients and companions.
induction_admission_relevance: From 2021-05, scheduled 37-38 week admission induction began in response to admission PCR.
source_document: Formal hospital COVID policy timeline confirmed by clinical team.
notes: Association validation period only; do not interpret as causal exposure without modeling and design assumptions.

policy_description: COVID policy relaxation; confirmed COVID obstetric patients triaged by severity; mild cases managed with simple isolation in single delivery-room rooms; admission induction returned to physician assessment and recommendation; on 2023-04-11 companion rapid-test requirement was cancelled.
admission_policy: Confirmed COVID obstetric patients triaged by severity; mild cases managed with simple isolation in single delivery-room rooms.
induction_admission_relevance: Admission induction returned to physician assessment and recommendation.
source_document: Formal hospital COVID policy timeline confirmed by clinical team.
notes: End date is dataset latest DELIVERY_TIME; no records are expected because available data end before policy_relaxation_period start.
